text.title: vector-database-setup Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of vector-database-setup enforces.

rule.statement: Benchmark candidate DBs on the actual vector count, dim, and queries/sec — never on toy 10k corpora.
rule.rationale: Vendor docs over-fit small benchmarks; real shape exposes the constraints.

rule.statement: Pick index: Flat for < 10k vectors, IVF for 10k-1M, HNSW for > 100k with low-latency p95 needs.
rule.rationale: Index type drives the recall/latency curve.

rule.statement: Wrap chosen DB behind a VectorStoreBase abstraction so swapping is one file.
Confirm metadata filter pushdown works server-side for the workload's needed predicates; do not filter client-side post-retrieval.
rule.rationale: Client-side filtering throws away the index benefit.

rule.statement: DB index dim must equal embedding model dim and distance must match the embedder's training (cosine for OpenAI, dot for some Voyage configs).
Skip when an existing vector DB already serves the workload acceptably.
rule.rationale: Stub rule referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml when none of the qualifying branches fire.
